services.subtitle: From strategy to managed services, we deliver every layer of the ServiceNow value chain with Saudi precision and global rigor.
services.heroSubtitle: Every service we offer is engineered to align technology with business outcomes — delivering measurable value at every stage of your digital journey.

items.title: ServiceNow Consulting
items.desc: Align ServiceNow investments with enterprise vision and Saudi Vision 2030 priorities.
items.challenge: Organizations struggle to extract full value from ServiceNow without a clear platform strategy aligned to business goals.
challenges: Unclear platform roadmap and investment priorities
Misalignment between IT capabilities and business outcomes
Lack of internal ServiceNow expertise and governance
items.overview: Our ServiceNow consulting practice helps organizations define, plan, and execute a strategic ServiceNow roadmap. We assess your current state, identify transformation opportunities, and create a clear path from fragmented operations to an integrated digital enterprise.
outcomes: Clear platform strategy aligned to business priorities
Defined ROI metrics and value realization plan
Governance framework for sustainable growth
Executive alignment and stakeholder buy-in

process.desc: Define roadmap, priorities, and investment plan.

process.title: Design
process.desc: Blueprint the solution architecture and governance model.

process.desc: Equip teams and leadership to drive adoption.

items.title: Implementation & Integration
items.desc: Secure, scalable rollouts across ITSM, ITOM, HRSD, CSM, and SecOps.
items.challenge: Poorly executed implementations create technical debt, low adoption, and failed ROI on expensive platform investments.
challenges: Complex legacy system integrations causing delays
Low user adoption due to poor change management
Over-customization creating upgrade obstacles
items.overview: Aldiratech delivers structured, risk-managed ServiceNow implementations using a proven methodology that ensures on-time delivery, seamless integrations, and high adoption rates. We configure, customize, and integrate ServiceNow across your enterprise ecosystem.
outcomes: On-time, on-budget deployments with minimal disruption
Seamless integration with existing enterprise systems
High user adoption through embedded change management
Future-proof architecture with upgrade-ready configurations

process.title: Build
process.desc: Configure, customize, and integrate the platform.

process.title: Test
process.desc: Comprehensive QA, UAT, and performance validation.

process.title: Deploy
process.desc: Go-live with full change management support.

items.title: IT Service Management
items.desc: Transform IT operations with structured incident, change, and problem management.
items.challenge: Reactive IT operations, unresolved incidents, and manual service desk processes drag down productivity and erode trust.
challenges: High incident volumes with slow resolution times
Manual, inconsistent service desk operations
Lack of visibility into IT performance and SLAs
items.overview: Our ITSM practice modernizes how your IT organization delivers, manages, and measures services. From incident and change management to service catalog and CMDB, we build structured operations that restore confidence and improve business outcomes.
outcomes: Reduced MTTR and incident resolution times
Structured change management with lower risk
Self-service adoption reducing service desk load
Real-time visibility into IT health and SLA compliance

process.title: Assess
process.desc: Evaluate current ITSM maturity and pain points.

process.title: Design
process.desc: Define service model, workflows, and SLA targets.

process.title: Implement
process.desc: Deploy and configure ITSM modules.

process.title: Optimize
process.desc: Tune performance and drive continuous improvement.

items.title: IT Operations Management
items.desc: Gain full visibility into infrastructure and proactively prevent outages.
items.challenge: Without unified infrastructure visibility, IT teams react to outages rather than preventing them — increasing downtime and business risk.
challenges: Blind spots across cloud, on-prem, and hybrid environments
Reactive incident response with no predictive capability
Disconnected monitoring tools creating operational silos
items.overview: Aldiratech's ITOM practice delivers comprehensive infrastructure visibility, event management, and AIOps capabilities on ServiceNow. We help organizations shift from reactive to proactive operations — reducing outages, accelerating resolution, and protecting business continuity.
outcomes: Complete infrastructure visibility across all environments
Proactive event correlation and intelligent alerting
Reduced MTTD and MTTR through AIOps
Lower operational risk and improved business continuity

process.title: Discover
process.desc: Map all infrastructure assets and dependencies.

process.title: Monitor
process.desc: Implement event management and health monitoring.

process.title: Correlate
process.desc: Enable AIOps for intelligent event correlation.

process.title: Automate
process.desc: Deploy remediation automation and runbooks.

items.title: HR Service Delivery
items.desc: Transform employee experiences with modern HR workflows and self-service portals.
items.challenge: Fragmented HR systems and manual processes create poor employee experiences, slow onboarding, and compliance risks.

Manual onboarding processes delaying productivity

items.overview: We implement ServiceNow HRSD to modernize how HR teams deliver services across the employee lifecycle. From onboarding to offboarding, case management to employee self-service, our solutions improve HR efficiency and transform the employee experience.
outcomes: Streamlined onboarding reducing time-to-productivity
Self-service portal reducing HR case volume by 40%+
Consistent, compliant HR case management
Improved employee satisfaction scores

outcomes: Platform stability with 99.9% uptime SLA
Continuous optimization and enhancement delivery

Predictable cost model for IT operations

From virtual agents to predictive analytics and workflow automation, we design AI-powered solutions that create measurable operational impact.

Faster incident resolution through AI-assisted triage

Optimized cloud costs through right-sizing and governance

about.heroTitle: Transforming Enterprise Operations from Saudi Arabia to the World
about.heroSubtitle: A forward-focused technology consulting and solutions company built to help organizations modernize operations, optimize service delivery, and accelerate digital transformation.
about.storyBody: Founded in 2018, Aldiratech was built on a single conviction: successful digital transformation requires more than software deployment. It requires strategic planning, industry expertise, execution discipline, and continuous operational support. From our headquarters in Riyadh, we have grown into a globally connected ServiceNow partner serving government, enterprise, and Vision 2030-aligned organizations across Saudi Arabia and beyond. Every engagement we undertake is guided by the belief that technology should serve people — creating better experiences, stronger operations, and measurable business value.
about.missionBody: To provide reliable, business-aligned, and transformation-focused technology services that help organizations modernize service delivery, improve operational efficiency, and create measurable enterprise value through ServiceNow and digital innovation.
about.visionBody: To be recognized as the leading ServiceNow and enterprise solutions partner in Saudi Arabia — known for delivering operational excellence, innovation, and long-term business impact through consulting, implementation, and strategic transformation.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that define how we work, engage, and deliver.

values.title: Business-First Thinking
values.desc: Every technology initiative begins with understanding the client's business goals, operational challenges, and transformation priorities.

values.title: Excellence in Delivery
values.desc: We prioritize precision, quality, and sustainable outcomes across consulting, implementation, and support.

values.title: Accountability
values.desc: From strategy through execution, we take full ownership of results and commitments.

values.title: Agility
values.desc: We adapt quickly to changing business environments, evolving technologies, and emerging opportunities.

values.title: Innovation with Purpose
values.desc: We focus on practical innovation that creates operational improvements and strategic business value.

values.title: Partnership Mindset
values.desc: We work alongside our clients as trusted advisors, collaborators, and long-term growth partners.

about.philosophyBody: At Aldiratech, leadership is defined by accountability, not authority. Our senior consultants and delivery leads take personal ownership of client outcomes — from the first discovery workshop to the final go-live. We believe the best results come from teams who combine global expertise with local understanding, and who measure success by client outcomes rather than project milestones.
about.visionAlignBody: Aldiratech is deeply committed to Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 transformation agenda. Our solutions are designed to support public sector digitization, private sector modernization, and the development of a knowledge-based economy. As a Saudi-led company, we understand the unique regulatory, cultural, and operational context of the Kingdom — and we bring that understanding to every engagement.

contact.heroSubtitle: Whether you're planning a ServiceNow implementation, exploring digital transformation, or need specialist technology talent — our experts are ready to help.
contact.globalDesc: While headquartered in Riyadh, Aldiratech serves clients across the GCC, UK, and globally through our K2 Partnering network.
contact.responseBody: Every inquiry is reviewed by a senior consultant. We respond within 1 business day and will never pass you to an automated sales funnel.

faq.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Aldiratech, our services, and how we deliver enterprise transformation.

items.q: What is Aldiratech?
items.a: Aldiratech is a Saudi-led technology consulting and digital transformation company specializing in ServiceNow implementation, enterprise workflow automation, and operational modernization. We serve government, enterprise, and Vision 2030-aligned organizations across Saudi Arabia and globally.

items.q: Where is Aldiratech based?
items.a: Our headquarters is in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. We serve clients across the GCC, UK, and globally through our K2 Partnering network and global delivery capabilities.

items.q: Is Aldiratech a certified ServiceNow partner?
items.a: Yes. Aldiratech operates as part of the K2 Partnering ecosystem, working with certified ServiceNow professionals across all major platform modules including ITSM, ITOM, HRSD, CSM, GRC, and SecOps.

items.q: What makes Aldiratech different from other IT consultancies?
items.a: We combine Saudi-led local expertise with global delivery capability. Our consultants understand the regulatory, cultural, and operational context of the Kingdom, and we measure success by client business outcomes — not just project completion.

items.q: Do you work with both government and private sector clients?
items.a: Yes. We have deep experience serving government entities, public sector organizations, and private enterprise across sectors including telecom, healthcare, oil and gas, banking, and retail.

items.q: Which ServiceNow modules do you implement?
items.a: We implement across the full ServiceNow platform including ITSM, ITOM, HRSD, CSM, GRC, SecOps, App Engine, and more. Our team holds certifications across all major modules.

items.q: Can you help us upgrade our existing ServiceNow environment?
items.a: Absolutely. We provide full upgrade management services including pre-upgrade assessment, custom scope impact analysis, testing, and go-live support.

items.q: Do you offer ServiceNow licensing advice?
items.a: Yes. As part of our consulting engagement, we help clients understand their licensing requirements, optimize their current entitlements, and plan for future platform growth.

items.q: Can you build custom applications on ServiceNow?
items.a: Yes. Our platform development team builds custom ServiceNow applications, portals, workflows, and integrations engineered to your specific operating model and requirements.

items.q: Do you support bilingual Arabic/English ServiceNow deployments?
items.a: Yes. This is a core competency. We deliver fully bilingual ServiceNow implementations with Arabic-first design, RTL support, and bilingual service portals and workflows.

items.q: How long does a ServiceNow implementation typically take?
items.a: Timeline varies by scope. A focused ITSM implementation can be completed in 8–12 weeks. Larger multi-module programs typically run 3–9 months depending on complexity, integrations, and organizational readiness.

items.q: What does your implementation methodology look like?
items.a: We follow a structured four-phase approach: Discovery & Blueprint, Build & Configure, Test & Validate, and Deploy & Adopt. Each phase includes defined milestones, deliverables, and governance checkpoints.

items.q: Do you handle change management as part of implementation?
items.a: Yes. Change management is embedded in every implementation — from stakeholder alignment and communication planning to training, user adoption programs, and post-go-live support.

items.q: What happens after go-live?
items.a: We offer comprehensive post-go-live support including hypercare periods, issue resolution, optimization reviews, and transition to our managed services if required.

items.q: What does your Managed Services offering include?
items.a: Our Managed Services provides platform monitoring, incident and change management, enhancement delivery, upgrade support, performance reviews, and strategic platform advisory — all delivered by bilingual ServiceNow experts.

items.q: What SLAs do you offer for managed services?
items.a: We offer tiered SLA models including 24/7 coverage with defined response and resolution times based on incident priority. Our standard managed service targets 99.9% platform availability.

items.q: Can we start managed services after implementation?
items.a: Yes. Many clients transition directly from implementation to managed services. We also onboard organizations whose ServiceNow environments were implemented by other partners.

items.q: What types of ServiceNow professionals do you provide?
items.a: We provide certified ServiceNow developers, architects, ITSM consultants, HRSD specialists, platform administrators, and business analysts — across both project-based and staff augmentation models.

items.q: Do your talent solutions include knowledge transfer?
items.a: Yes. We build knowledge transfer into every talent engagement to ensure client teams develop internal capability alongside our specialists.

items.q: Can you support both short-term and long-term talent needs?
items.a: Yes. We offer flexible engagement models from short-term project support to dedicated long-term resource teams embedded in your organization.
